hub.title: Enterprise AI Agent Orchestration Blueprints
hub.topicEntity: AI agent orchestration architecture for enterprises
hub.summary: A comprehensive blueprint for designing, governing, and scaling enterprise-grade AI agent orchestration—from reference architectures and component patterns to security, evaluation, and operational runbooks—so teams can build reliable multi-agent systems that integrate with existing data, tools, and workflows.

spokes.title: Reference Architecture for Agent Orchestration Workflows
spokes.topicEntity: Blueprint-level orchestration patterns and workflow design
spokes.summary: Defines a practical reference architecture for orchestrating enterprise AI agents, including routing, planning/execution loops, tool invocation, memory boundaries, and workflow orchestration patterns that teams can implement across business functions.
spokes.anchorToHub: back to enterprise AI agent orchestration blueprints and the end-to-end orchestration architecture
spokes.hubAnchorToSpoke: reference architecture for agent orchestration workflows

spokes.title: Governance, Security, and Evaluation for Orchestrated Agents
spokes.topicEntity: Controls, risk management, and evaluation strategy
spokes.summary: Details governance and security guardrails for agent orchestration in enterprise settings—identity and access, data handling, auditability, policy enforcement, red-teaming—and introduces evaluation methods for reliability, safety, and compliance at the workflow level.
spokes.anchorToHub: returning to governance, security, and evaluation within the enterprise AI agent orchestration blueprints hub
spokes.hubAnchorToSpoke: governance, security, and evaluation for orchestrated agents

spokes.title: Deployment, Observability, and Scaling Operations
spokes.topicEntity: Production operations for AI agent orchestration
spokes.summary: Covers production deployment patterns and operational excellence for orchestrated agents, including telemetry and tracing, SLOs/SLAs, incident response, cost and latency optimization, and scaling strategies for multi-agent workloads across environments.
spokes.anchorToHub: connecting back to the operational and scaling blueprint in enterprise AI agent orchestration blueprints
